title: JAMB Registration Opens
description: 2026 UTME registration begins at accredited CBT centres nationwide. Ensure your NIN is linked before visiting a centre.

title: JAMB Mock-UTME
description: Optional mock examination for registered candidates at designated CBT centres. Highly recommended for first-time candidates.

title: UTME 2026 Begins
description: Main Unified Tertiary Matriculation Examination commences nationwide. Candidates must bring their exam slip and a valid ID.

title: JAMB FIXES 2026/2027 ADMISSIONS POLICY MEETING FOR MAY 11
description:
JAMB has announced the 2026/2027 Admissions Policy Meeting for all tertiary institutions. The meeting is scheduled for May 11th, 2026 and will set guidelines for the new admission cycle.

The policy meeting will determine cut-off marks, admission quotas, and timelines for universities, polytechnics, and colleges. All institutions must attend to align with JAMB directives for 2026/2027 admissions.

Students awaiting admission should note this date. After the meeting, schools will release Post-UTME forms and official cut-off marks. Stay updated and avoid relying on fake admission news.
